itinerary.description: Take the wheelchair-accessible Airport Express Bus (Línea Exprés Aeropuerto) from Madrid-Barajas Airport to Atocha station, a major transport hub in the city center.
itinerary.transport_to_next: Walk/roll from Atocha to Lavapiés (approx. 15-20 min)

itinerary.description: Enjoy an evening stroll through the vibrant and diverse Lavapiés neighborhood, known for its narrow streets, street art, and multicultural atmosphere. The area is generally accessible.
itinerary.transport_to_next: Walk/roll to Santa y pura Vegan Bar (approx. 5-10 min)

itinerary.description: Savor an inexpensive and delicious vegan meal at Santa y pura Vegan Bar. The restaurant offers a wheelchair-accessible entrance and seating. Please note that a wheelchair-accessible restroom is not explicitly confirmed.

itinerary.activity_name: Explore Plaza Mayor and Puerta del Sol
itinerary.description: Experience the vibrant evening atmosphere of Madrid's historic main squares. Both Plaza Mayor and Puerta del Sol are pedestrian-friendly and generally flat, offering good accessibility for wheelchair users.

itinerary.activity_name: Airport Express Bus to Madrid-Barajas Airport
itinerary.description: Take the wheelchair-accessible Airport Express Bus from Atocha station directly back to Madrid-Barajas Airport.
